objective.title: 🎯 Objective
objective.description: Guess the daily mystery Pokémon in 8 tries or less!

features.dailyPokemon: Each day features a new mystery Pokémon
features.sharedPokemon: Everyone gets the same Pokémon each day
features.useClues: Use the clues from each guess to narrow down your options

howCluesWork.title: 🔍 How Clues Work
howCluesWork.introduction: After each guess, you'll get feedback based on 5 categories:

types.title: 🍃💧🔥 Type 1 & Type 2
types.description: How effective would your guess' types be when attacking the target Pokémon?
types.matchDescription: If types match exactly, you'll see a checkmark! ✅ Otherwise, you may see different icons depending on how effective the type is!

na.label: Not Applicable:
na.description: Your Pokémon is a monotype, and the target is not.

match.label: Match:
match.description: Your guessed Pokémon's type matches the target's. If both Pokémon are monotypes, Type 2 will be a match

generation.title: 📅 Generation
generation.description: Is the target from the same generation as your guess?

newer.label: Newer:
newer.description: Target is from a newer generation than your guess

older.label: Older:
older.description: Target is from an older generation than your guess

match.label: Match:
match.description: You guess belongs to the same generation as your target!

color.title: 🎨 Color
color.description: Do both Pokémon share the same primary color?
color.classificationDescription: Based on official Pokédex color classifications

match.label: Match:
match.description: Your guess shares the same primary color as the target Pokémon

different.label: Different:
different.description: Your guess has a different primary color than the target Pokémon

height.title: 📏 Height
height.description: How effective would your guess' types be against the target Pokémon?
height.measurementDescription: Measured in meters (e.g., Pikachu is 0.4m tall)

taller.label: Taller:
taller.description: Target is taller than your guess

shorter.label: Shorter:
shorter.description: Target is shorter than your guess

match.label: Match:
match.description: Your guess is the same height as the target!

examples.title: 💡 Example Guesses
examples.description: Suppose the mystery Pokémon is Gyarados (Water/Flying, Gen 1, Blue, 6.5m tall), and you make the following 2 guesses. You will receive the following feedback:
